reviews.comment:
Mejoraron un poco la atención, que como socio del ACA que tristemente sigo siendo es en general paupérrima. En este caso evidencian unas pequeñas mejoras.

(Translated by Google)
They improved the service a little, which, as a member of the ACA (which I sadly still am), is generally abysmal. In this case, they showed some minor improvements.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQybGRTaDhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cómo toda estación del A.C.A. necesita volver a lo que fue su época dorada. La atención es buena, combustible 24hs. Atención del Full cerrado en la noche. Tal vez por la época.

(Translated by Google)
Like every A.C.A. station, it needs to return to its golden age. The service is good, and fuel is available 24 hours a day. The full service is closed at night, perhaps due to the time of year.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQycWRTX3pBRRAB
